text: In a competitive job market, employers expect graduates to have a range of skills and right experience of the workplace. MSAJCE provides at most care, support and ample opportunities to help students develop requisite skills and expertise and make them employable graduates.

1. To provide Employment Opportunities for students in reputed companies. 2. To organize On and Off Campus Recruitment Drives for students. 3. To Train students on employability skills such as Aptitude Skills, Communication Skills and Technical Skills. 4. To conduct Value Added Certification courses to gain domain specific knowledge. 5. To conduct Mock Aptitude, Mock Interview, Mock GD to prepare students to face the interview with confidence. 6. To arrange In-plant training, Internship and Industrial visits. 7. To organize workshops on Recent Technologies by industrial experts which benefits students to understand technological innovations.

Dr. S. Vijay Ananth - Placement Director, Mr. L. Tharanikumar - Assistant Placement Officer, Mr. S.V. Vinodh - Member, Mr. J.H. Hammer Shield - Member, Mr. M. Dominic Bro - Member, Mr. P. Nithin Karthik - Member.

1. Well-furnished air-conditioned rooms for written test, group discussion and face-to-face interview. 2. Well-established Computer labs for online training and examinations. 3. Air-conditioned Auditorium / Seminar Halls / Meeting Halls. 4. Dedicated AC rooms for conducting group discussions. 5. Career counselling is available on campus directing students to choose the best possible stream that meets their requirement in a unique way.
Placement Training on Aptitude Skills from 01.08.2023 to 06.08.2023, conducted for 65 students by Nexon Technology.

1. Soft Skill Training Program from 25.05.2023 to 07.05.2023 for 200 students by Rubicon Technology. 2. JAVA Full Stack Development Training from 06.03.2023 to 31.03.2023 for 40 students by ICT Academy and Inspirysys Software Solution.

1. An Icebreaking session on Interview Fear conducted by Mr. Dennie John on 07.02.2023 for 65 participants. 2. Online Mock Interview Session on HR and Technical Interview by Mr. Mohammed Hussain TR on 05.11.2022 for 40 participants.
Top recruiters include Lenovo (75 students), Zoho Tech's (51), Green Valleys Shelters (45), Thermodyn (39).

1. Sign MoUs with industries for mutual benefit. 2. Organize workshops, conferences, seminars, guest lectures and symposia. 3. Encourage faculty to undergo industry training. 4. Engage industrial experts to interact with students.
ISRO Propulsion Research Complex, Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre, National Institute of Wind Energy.

1. Create awareness among students on higher education in India and abroad. 2. Motivate students to reach their goal. 3. Inform students about programs related to Higher Education organized by other colleges.
